name: Metric delta

en.when_to_use: Use it when you only need to emphasize one KPI's before-to-after values, absolute delta, and percentage change, such as for performance optimization, conversion experiments, cost changes, or release summaries. For several metrics use a KPI grid or table; for the full trend over time use a line chart.
en.why_valuable: A single changed value does not justify a full charting library, but plain text easily omits whether the direction is good or bad, the unit, and the baseline period. This compact component consistently formats the before/after values, delta, percentage, improvement/regression semantics, and paired length references.

data_in.note: data represents one scalar at two points in time. before and after must be finite numbers; the component calculates delta and percentage. prefix/suffix/decimals control consistent formatting across all three numbers. direction specifies the business-positive direction: increase-good, decrease-good, or neutral. When before=0, percentage is unavailable.

schema.label: string -- metric name
schema.before: number -- finite value before the change
schema.after: number -- finite value after the change
schema.suffix?: string -- value suffix, for example ms, %, or kg
schema.decimals?: integer 0-6 -- decimal places for before, after, and absolute delta; defaults to 0
schema.direction?: 'increase-good'|'decrease-good'|'neutral' -- business-positive direction; neutral does not classify an increase or decrease as good or bad
schema.fromLabel?: string -- short baseline-value/period label; defaults to Before
schema.toLabel?: string -- short new-value/period label; defaults to After
schema.note?: string -- definition, sample, or measurement-condition note

spec.note: The compact single card grows naturally with content; on mobile the delta state wraps to a new row. It performs no vh use, animation, or carrier-size reads.

when_to_use: 只需要突出一个 KPI 的 before→after、绝对 Δ 和百分比变化时用它：适合性能优化、转化率实验、成本变化和版本发布摘要。要比较多项指标时用 KPI 网格或表格；要看随时间的完整趋势时用折线图。
why_valuable: 单个变化值不值得引入完整图表库，但纯文本又容易漏掉方向好坏、单位和基准期；这个紧凑组件统一格式化前后值、Δ、百分比、改善/退步语义和双条长度参照。

data_in.note: data 表示一个标量在两个时点的变化。before 与 after 必须是有限数字；delta 与百分比由组件计算。prefix/suffix/decimals 控制三处数值的一致格式。direction 指定业务上的“好方向”：increase-good、decrease-good 或 neutral；before=0 时百分比显示不可用。

schema.label: string —— 指标名称
schema.before: number —— 变化前的有限数值
schema.after: number —— 变化后的有限数值
schema.suffix?: string —— 数值后缀，例如 ms、% 或 kg
schema.decimals?: integer 0–6 —— 前后值与绝对 Δ 的小数位；省略为 0
schema.direction?: 'increase-good'|'decrease-good'|'neutral' —— 业务好方向；neutral 不把增减判为好或坏
schema.fromLabel?: string —— 基准值/基准期短标签；省略为 Before
schema.toLabel?: string —— 新值/新时期短标签；省略为 After
schema.note?: string —— 口径、样本或测量条件说明

spec.note: 紧凑单卡按内容自动增高；移动端将 Δ 状态折到新行。无 vh、动画或载体尺寸读取。

example._why: 用首屏主线程阻塞时间优化展示下降即改善的方向语义，前后值、−55 ms、−29.9% 与测量口径都能一次验证。

minimal.label: Main-thread blocking time
minimal.note: Median of 30 mobile Lighthouse runs on the product landing page.

uplink: display-only，无 uplink；组件不派发宿主或全局事件，所有悬停反馈都只发生在自有 shadow root 内。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
